originalTitle: USA v Belgium: World Cup 2026 last 16 – live
summary: Minute-by-minute report: Can the Americans reach their first quarter-final since 2002 or will Belgium stand in their way? Join Beau Dure for updates
content: 49 min Half-decent cross from Robinson. Balogun rises but can’t quite get a decent shot. 48 min Freeman draws a foul, USA string together a couple of passes, but the attack stalls in the penalty arc. 47 min Pulisic hounds Belgium into an errant touch. Throw-in. Halftime sub: Reyna for … Dest? I didn’t think Dest was the problem. More mail Kári Tulinius: “Belgium have a clear plan of attack. Trossard and Lukebagio try to cross it towards De Ketelaere from fifteen-twenty yards. I have no idea how the US means to score from open play. They’re much less incisive than they’ve been so far at this tournament. I wonder if the sudden reintegration of Balogun did more to disrupt their preparations than it their opponents’.” Casiano Martinez: “I’m sure it’s been discussed, but has anyone asked Pochettino directly why he’s wearing a janitor/prisoner outfit for every game so far?” Peter Oh: “I’ve been to Belgium once, over forty years ago. I understand it really well. Really well. One of the few things I remember is the monument at Waterloo. As in, ‘he met his Waterloo’. Someone’s gonna meet their Waterloo today, right?” Now I have ABBA stuck in my head. Ceci n’est pas apropos du carton rouge (Apologies for my terrible French.) Kevin Chauncey: “In response to Tina Montenegro: ‘People now want to buy the pink and blue Belgian jersey to better root against the USA. I support them: that jersey is an homage to the painter Magritte and it has “Ceci n’est pas un maillot” on the back. Seems fitting for this World Cup.’ “Okay, wait, interesting point. Those paintings weren’t pipes, apples, whatever. They were representations, paintings. But ... those literally ARE jerseys. (I get that maybe Adidas is going for “it’s more than a jersey or whatever). Is it fitting for this World Cup because it’s taking place within a pervasive reality distortion field?” Bosnia and Herzegovina hammered cross after cross at the USA in the round of 32. The US defense didn’t let any of them through. Every Belgian cross looks like a potential goal in this game. The corner kick goes to an unchallenged Courtois, and that’s that. What will Pochettino conjure at halftime? Of the USA’s opponents thus far, Belgium is certainly playing the most competent soccer, and the USA haven’t figured out how to respond. 45 min +6 USA passing around with a bit too much nonchalance. But Dest gets it, nutmegs a defender, races forward, passes to Balogun, and Balogun plays it off a defender for a corner kick. 45 min +4 Half-chance for the USA as Tillman threads a well-placed through ball to Balogun. Courtois has to come out to greet him and doesn’t take it cleanly – the great Belgian keeper looks less than his normal self here. 45 min +4 Belgium demonstrate how to overcome a review of whether it’s a corner kick or a goal kick. Just take the corner before anyone can react. The officials should’ve held that up but did not. Nothing comes from the corner, anyway. 45 min +3 USA on the break. Dest runs into a defender and looks for a call. None given. 45 min +1 Balogun had to reach a foot around a defender (cleanly) to get that shot, so it wasn’t the easiest. But if it had gone on frame, Courtois wouldn’t have been able to do much. 44 min Dest makes a good run, but his pass is behind Balogun. Somehow, Balogun manages to play it out off a Belgian defender, and it’ll be a deep throw-in for Tillman. The referee stops everyone to break things up. The throw-in goes all the way through to the 6-yard box, Freeman flicks it downward with a header, and Balogun is there to shoot … high. The referee initially awards a corner kick, but VAR begs to differ. Six minutes of stoppage time. 43 min De Kuyper’s free kick sails over a couple of US defenders to Lukebakio, whose header is wide. 41 min Courtois is again pressed to play the ball long, but this time, Belgium wind up with possession. Richards, for some reason, drifts a good ways up the field and shoves Vanaken, giving Belgium a free kick. 40 min Over the top for Balogun, and he coaxes a throw-in out of the Belgian defense. Going more direct might not be a bad idea. 39 min Tielemans takes the corner, Raskin redirects it from an angle to the near post, but Freese is there. 38 min Dangerous cross, and Adams heads it clear for a Belgium corner. 37 min Giveaway from Tillman. USA pressing again, and Belgium are laboring to get out of their own half. Before the goal, this from Christopher Faherty: “Ream with no Lukaku seems pointless. That outside CB stepping into midfield and helping with the rotation seems necessary today, and Ream can’t do anything like that. Pochettino should consider a switch there already.” 35 min Freeman is overlapping on the right, which I think is a mistake given the fact that Dest is already there. Yellow to McKennie for a late tackle. Seems fair. The US defense are having a nightmare. Trossard gets the ball wide on the left, gets to the goal line, crosses, and De Ketelaere beats Ream in the air for another tap-in. That’s the USA’s first shot. The xG count is now 1.35 to 0.09. A cruel stat-keeper would rule that an own goal by Vanaken. It shouldn’t be scored that way because the initial shot was on frame. The free kick is slammed into the wall but deflects to the right, and Courtois was already going the other way. Will Tillman strike again? 30 min Balogun draws a free kick near the penalty arc. Terrible decision by Mechele. 29 min McKennie is hauled down by Raskin. Not many fouls in this game thus far. 28 min Freeman and Dest try a give-and-go deep on the right flank but can’t pull it off. 27 min We’re back, and Courtois completes a pass! Finally had a short-range outlet to relieve the pressure. Daniel Halladay: “Rudi Garcia’s blue shirt and sweaty ‘pits are reminiscent of Jose Antonio Camacho in 2002!” Final thoughts on the red card, etc., really … Another dissenting view … Burt Bosma: “Starmer contacts FIFA about the starting time in Mexico, Trump contacts FIFA about an unjust red card … big deal
chineseTitle: 美国 vs 比利时：2026 年世界杯 16 强 – 直播
chineseSummary: 详细报道：美国队能否自 2002 年以来首次打进四分之一决赛，还是比利时队会阻碍他们？加入 Beau Dure 了解最新动态
chineseContent: 49分钟，罗宾逊传中，传中。巴洛贡站了起来，但未能获得像样的射门。第48分钟，弗里曼犯规，美国队多次传球，但进攻在禁区内停滞。第47分钟，普利西奇让比利时队触球失误。界外球。半场替补：雷纳换……目的地？我不认为德斯特是问题所在。更多邮件 Kári Tulinius：“比利时队有一个明确的进攻计划。特罗萨德和卢克巴吉奥试图从 15-20 码处向德克特拉雷传球。我不知道美国队如何在空战中得分。他们在本届世界杯上的表现远不如迄今为止那么敏锐。我想知道巴洛贡的突然重新融入对他们的准备工作的干扰是否比对手更大。”卡西亚诺·马丁内斯：“我确信这已经被讨论过，但是有人直接问过波切蒂诺为什么他到目前为止每场比赛都穿着看门人/囚犯的衣服吗？” Peter Oh：“四十多年前，我去过比利时一次。我非常了解它。非常了解。我记得的为数不多的事情之一就是滑铁卢的纪念碑。就像‘他遇到了他的滑铁卢’一样。今天有人会遇到他们的滑铁卢，对吧？”现在，ABBA 已经深深地印在我的脑海里了。 Ceci n’est pas apropos du carton rouge（为我糟糕的法语道歉。）凯文·昌西（Kevin Chauncey）：“回应蒂娜·蒙特内格罗（Tina Montenegro）：‘人们现在想购买粉色和蓝色的比利时球衣，以便更好地对抗美国。我支持他们：这件球衣是向画家马格利特致敬，背面有“Ceci n’est pas un maillot”字样。看起来很适合本届世界杯。’ “好吧，等等，有趣的一点。那些画不是烟斗、苹果之类的。它们是再现、绘画。但是……那些实际上是球衣。 （我知道阿迪达斯的目标可能是“它不仅仅是一件球衣或其他什么）。它适合本届世界杯吗？因为我
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
